Motion To Relieve As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Re: Defendant Edwin Quintana.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed.

The movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
